Flagship_Events.description: Elegance is not merely seen-it is felt, like the elements themselves. Ignite the stage with your talent, flow with confidence, stand strong in intellect, and soar with charm. Dominate the elements and claim the title.

Step into the shoes of ambassadors and command the global stage. Defend your nation's stance, engage in high-stakes international negotiations, and prove your mettle. MUNSC at Exodia is where powerful voices and sharp minds converge.

Prepare to bring your favourite characters to life in a spectacle of creativity and imagination. Whether you're a wizard, a goblin, or the dark lord himself, the spotlight is yours. Prepare to transform an ordinary evening into a magical adventure!

Unleash raw power and primal discipline at Men's Physique, where strength meets the Elemental spirit. Like earth forged in stone and fire refined through resilience, competitors embody balance, symmetry, and controlled intensity. This is not just a display of muscle-it's a celebration of dedication, confidence, and the elemental force within. Step into the arena and let your presence speak louder than power itself.

Dance_Events.description: Calling all the Astra Pro dancers to get ready for the greatest dance showdown of IIT Mandi. Put on your dancing shoes and create every movement in synchronisation. From grounded strength to flowing grace, fiery intensity to effortless motion each tribe is going to set a blaze on the stage.

'A duet is not just two people dancing, its two bodies rooted in rhythm moving as one, showing Cosmo to the world', The most interesting and engaging dance of the evening awaits your participation so just hop in and captivate the audience with your crackle, choreography and coordination.

Showcase your talent in the world of dance, be it the dancing dhara, mira, pyra, anil or the astra! All dance forms from Kathak to Bharatnatyam, hip hop to jazz, freestyle to semiclassical are being looked forward to, the Dance 'Bhumi' is open to folks.

Get ready to channel your inner aerials and come in to challenge your 'dudes' with your cool 'moves', Jump and Join in for the street battle with your Zephers and let the other sit in gaze and glaze over your grooves.

Drama_Events.description: The stage is an empty Space waiting for your magic. Fill it with drama, emotion, and madness. Don't just act-create an entire universe that sucks the audience in.

No mics, no fancy lights-just you and the Earth beneath your feet. Bring stories that are raw, real, and loud enough to shake society. If your voice can stop a crowd in its tracks, the street is yours.
Scripts are for beginners. Here, you gotta flow like Water. We give you a random scene, and you adapt instantly. Be smooth, be quick, and don't let the conversation dry up. Can you swim in the chaos?

Life is heavy, but your jokes should make it light. Turn your daily chaos, awkward encounters, and life struggles into pure comedy. No filters, no limits-just you and the mic. It's time to take your ranting skills to the next level.

You don't need a team to start a fire; one spark is enough. Standing alone in the spotlight, can you bring the heat? Unleash your inner Fire, own the stage, and leave the audience burnt by your performance.

Life is loud, but mime speaks in silence. Turn everyday chaos, awkward moments, and unspoken emotions into expressive movement and storytelling. With no dialogue and no sound, it’s just you, your movements, and the story you want to tell. Let your actions do the talking and bring silent moments to life onstage.

Music_Events.description: 'When voices blend, magic happens.' A pair singing event where two voices unite, transforming natural emotions and shared melodies into powerful harmony. So let's mesmerize the audience through music that draws its strength and soul from the essence of nature.
Music_Events.dates: Lyrics Sheet should be submitted 1 hour before the event

Music_Events.description: 'Where one voice lights the night.' Let's put the stage on raging fire with your electrifying voice. So Blazevox is a fiery solo singing competition where brilliant voices meet the igniting passion, emotions and make the stage alive with true power and soulful melody.
Music_Events.dates: Lyrics Sheet should be submitted 1 hour before the event

Music_Events.description: 'Let's turn sound into thunder.' Band Storm is a high-voltage band battle where roaring guitars, hammering drums, and magical vocals merge to create an unforgettable musical storm. So get ready for the explosive performance and thunderous beats.
Music_Events.dates: Lyrics Sheet should be submitted 1 hour before the event

Art_Events.description: In Canvas alchemy, participants translate the essence of nature's elements into expressive canvas paintings. Through form, shade, and symbolism, artists capture the unseen energy and interconnectedness of the elemental arc.
Art_Events.dates: Theme release: 18th March, Submission Window: 21st March - 5th April EOD

Art_Events.description: Paint your heart out in this water colour painting. Feel the fire inside of you and let your emotions loose like the Ethereal breeze or the free willed water by painting what you feel.

In Folded Elements, paper becomes the language of storytelling. Using origami folds and quilled textures, participants will craft a scene, blending creativity with structure to express nature’s rhythm, movement, and emotion.

Art doesn't occur with paper and paintbrushes alone but with skin, breath, and expression as well. Take your colours and unleash the elements as you bring art to life with masks inspired by earth, fire, air, and water. You will be given the task of painting another person's face and hands, decorating them by capturing the spirit of nature.

Photography_and_Videography_Events.description: 'Trends come and go like waves. Can you catch one? Create a few second masterpiece that flows smoothly and spreads like a tsunami. Make it fun, make it viral, and let your creativity flood the feed.'

Photography_and_Videography_Events.event_name: Sell It Like Fire: Ad Making
Photography_and_Videography_Events.description: 'Got a boring product? Make it lit. Like Fire, your ad needs to spread fast and ignite a desire. You have few seconds to spark an interest that turns into obsession.'
Photography_and_Videography_Events.dates: Theme release: 20th March, Submission Window: 22nd March - 5th April EOD

Photography_and_Videography_Events.description: 'Don't just click a pic; tell us a story grounded in reality. Like layers of Earth, your photos should reveal something deep. String together a tale that hits hard and feels real.'
Photography_and_Videography_Events.dates: Theme release: 10th April, Submission Window: 11th April - 13th April till 9 a.m.

Photography_and_Videography_Events.description: Not explicitly described in brochure, but listed in schedule.
Photography_and_Videography_Events.dates: Theme release: 10th April, Submission Window: 11th April - 13th April till 9 a.m.

Design_Events.description: Step into the realm of the five elements and craft a character born from the nature's prime focus. In Elementa, participants will design an original character influenced by the elemental energy, timeless stories and personal instincts. This challenge invites you to bring your character to life through creativity, visuals and storytelling.
Design_Events.dates: Theme release: 18th March, Submission Window: 20th March - 5th April EOD

Design_Events.event_name: Brand Makeover Challenge: Fivefold Brand Revival
Design_Events.description: A challenge where brands get a fresh start inspired by the five elements. Jump in to participate by reimagining it by drawing inspirations from the earth's elemental qualities. From redesigning the logo to shaping the tagline, we look forward to the water warriors and the blazing battlers to combine their creative ideas to build brands that feel relevant and meaningful today.
Design_Events.dates: Theme release: 10th March, Submission Window: 14th March - 28th April EOD

Literary_Events.description: 'Hawa-e-Ghazal mein alfaaz behte hain, mehfil jamti hai, aur har ghazal apna nishaan chhod jaati hai.' Hawa-e-Ghazal is a soulful Mushaira where verses flow like a gentle breeze, carrying emotions, romance, and timeless poetry that in stays the hearts of the audience.

'If mysteries excite you, step in.' Case Crackers is a crime-solving challenge where teams race against time to follow clues, connect evidence, and uncover the truth hidden beneath layers of mystery. So keep your Detective mode: ON.

'Sharp minds only.' Elemental Enigma is a cryptic crossword event where clever clues and elemental themes come together, pushing participants to think smart, spot patterns, and crack hidden meanings fast. Let's turn every solved word into a moment of pure intellectual thrill. So 'Crack the clue, beat the clock.'

From brain to page, Just vibe and write. ELEMENTA INK invites writers to break limits and turn imagination into powerful written expression.. Let your words flow like water, burn like fire, and rise freely across the page.

No filters. No pauses. Just poetry. RHYME & RAGE is a high-energy slam poetry battlefield where fierce words, raw emotions, and fearless voices collide, turning personal truths and social fire into explosive performances.

Quizzing_Events.description: Look at the world of science through the eyes of nature's elements and explore your beauty that lies in nature. This Sci-Tech Quiz tests your knowledge of basic forces, scientific ideas, and new technology.

Read myths and folktales from all over the world to learn about other cultures. Find out interesting stories about gods, monsters, and how things came to be. A quiz that honors the diversity of myths from around the world.

The world is full of amazing facts just waiting to be discovered. Mind Odyssey urges all curious minds to explore all there is to know about history, science, and the world today. Take the test, stir your curiosity, and join the ranks of the smartest!
